description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two stages, test and deploy, using golang:1.14.15-alpine3.12 as the default Docker image and google/cloud-sdk:366.0.0 for the deploy job. Add a format-test job in the test stage that runs `export CGO_ENABLED=0`, `go fmt`, `go vet`, `go test -cover -coverprofile cover.out ./...`, and `go tool cover -html=cover.out -o cover.html`, then stores the generated cover.html as an artifact that expires in three days. Add a pages job in the deploy stage that depends on format-test, runs only on the master branch, creates the directory public/coverage, moves cover.html to public/coverage/index.html, and publishes the public/ directory as a pages artifact. Add a deploy job in the deploy stage that runs manually, decodes the GCLOUD_ACCOUNT secret and activates the GCP service account with `echo ${GCLOUD_ACCOUNT} | base64 --decode | gcloud auth activate-service-account --key-file=-`, then executes `gcloud app deploy --no-promote`.
